div.style: display: inline-block; background-color: #d9e0e7; padding: 6px; margin: 4px; border: 1px solid #8da1b4; border-radius: 5px; line-height: 60%

table.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top;

tr.style: border: 1px #F0F0F0 solid; font-size: 11px; font-family: verdana; vertical-align: top

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: The logical name of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Information about the use of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

a.title: Minimum and Maximum # of times the element can appear in the instance

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px; width: 100px

a.title: Reference to the type of the element

th.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; padding-top: 3px; padding-bottom: 3px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck1.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: #F7F7F7

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck10.png)
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

span.style: padding-left: 3px; padding-right: 3px; color: white; background-color: red
span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: #F7F7F7; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

td.span: Name of device manufacturer. If the manufacturer code is included in an identifier, manufacturer must correspond to that code.

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

td.style: font-size: 11px

td.style: font-size: 11px

td.style: font-size: 11px

td.span: The actual design of the device and/or software version running on the device

td.style: font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

tr.style: border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px; vertical-align: top; background-color: white

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px; white-space: nowrap; background-image: url(tbl_bck00.png)

span.title: This element has obligations

td.style: vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px
vertical-align: top; text-align : var(--ig-left,left); background-color: white; border: 0px #F0F0F0 solid; padding:0px 4px 0px 4px

font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;
font-size: 11px
font-size: 11px; opacity: 0.5;

description.value: Obligations for the logical model of device in the scope of laboratory use case

valueMarkdown.value: Consumer system SHALL consider the value to assees comparability of the result values if device is the author of the observation.

short.value: Name of device manufacturer. If the manufacturer code is included in an identifier, manufacturer must correspond to that code.

definition.value: Name of device manufacturer. If the manufacturer code is included in an identifier, manufacturer must correspond to that code.

short.value: The date and time when the device was manufactured

definition.value: The date and time when the device was manufactured

short.value: The date and time beyond which this device is no longer valid or should not be used (if applicable)

definition.value: The date and time beyond which this device is no longer valid or should not be used (if applicable)

short.value: Lot number of device. May be omitted if included in an identifier.

definition.value: Lot number of device. May be omitted if included in an identifier.

short.value: Serial number assigned by the manufacturer. May be omitted if included in an identifier.

definition.value: Serial number assigned by the manufacturer. May be omitted if included in an identifier.

short.value: The name and name type of the device.

definition.value: The name and name type of the device.

short.value: The name of the device as known to e.g. the manufacturer and/or patient

definition.value: The name of the device as known to e.g. the manufacturer and/or patient

short.value: The type of name, e.g. UDI Label name, user friendly name

definition.value: The type of name, e.g. UDI Label name, user friendly name

short.value: The manufacturer's model number for the device

definition.value: The manufacturer's model number for the device

short.value: The actual design of the device and/or software version running on the device

definition.value: The actual design of the device and/or software version running on the device

valueMarkdown.value: Consumer system SHALL consider the value to assees comparability of the result values if device is the author of the observation.
